# Act 2: The Missing Layer {.section}

---

## 07. Not Another Planning Tool

::: {.toc-only}
Separate Protopipe from backlog, documentation, reporting, and governance tools.
:::

---

## 08. Augmented Product Development Platform

::: {.toc-only}
Introduce APDP as the capability layer that connects purpose, strategy,
product, architecture, development, observations, learning, and decision.
:::

---

## 09. The Chain That Must Stay Connected

::: {.flow}
Purpose -> Strategy -> Problem -> Hypothesis -> Experiment -> Architecture -> Development -> Monitoring -> Observations -> Decision -> Learning
:::

---

## 10. Why AI Changes the Feasibility Curve

::: {.toc-only}
Position AI as synchronization, retrieval, critique, and translation capacity,
not as generic automation.
:::

---

## 11. Why DevOps Was Not Enough

::: {.toc-only}
Show that deployment feedback improved engineering flow, but did not fully
connect purpose, strategy, product, architecture, observations, and
organizational memory.
:::
